title: What's in a Smoothness Constant? Tighter Rates for Local SGD with Bounded Second-Order Heterogeneity
abstract: Local SGD is a distributed optimization algorithm whose behavior depends on data heterogeneity. This fixture mirrors a current record so that the discovery report can test stable arXiv matching without network access or any change to the reviewed website.

title: A Synthetic New Paper for Offline Review Testing
abstract: This deliberately synthetic fixture tests the review workflow for a new stochastic optimization publication. It contains enough substantive metadata to exercise canonical validation, topic suggestions, publication rendering, provenance reporting, and the explicit human approval boundary without querying an external service.
